test_cases.prompt: initialize jules-companion in this new project with Windows operating system
assertions: Assistant detects Windows OS and configures backslash path separator.
Assistant performs path checks using where command.
Assistant copies jules-cli.md, jules-api.md, and prompt-templates.md into .jules-companion/references/ locally.

test_cases.prompt: one of the reference files jules-cli.md was accidentally deleted from .jules-companion/references/
assertions: Assistant audits local reference files during initialization.
Assistant autonomously detects missing jules-cli.md.
Assistant copies jules-cli.md from global folder to restore local integrity.

test_cases.prompt: synchronize all project sessions and merge parallel sessions sess_abc and sess_def
assertions: Assistant executes jules remote list --session to retrieve cloud sessions.
Assistant merges cloud sessions data into sessions.json cache.
Assistant pulls sess_abc and sess_def to isolated branches and guides a consolidated multi-merge.

test_cases.prompt: run /jules-companion doctor command to check the skill health
assertions: Assistant audits global customization folders.
Assistant audits local staging directories and .gitignore settings.
Assistant checks CLI version, login status, and key validities and outputs status table.

test_cases.prompt: help me design and refactor this backend to be decentralized, P2P, and censorship-resistant
assertions: Assistant suggests delegating to Partisan 🛰️ agent.
Assistant describes P2P overlay networks (IPFS/Tor) in suggested prompt.
Assistant enforces boundaries of Coding group for Partisan.

test_cases.prompt: configure Nginx reverse proxy for our web server to use SSL and port forwarding
assertions: Assistant suggests delegating to Netrunner 🌐 agent.
Assistant configures reverse proxy and web-networking protocols in suggested prompt.
Assistant places Netrunner 🌐 in Coding Group.

test_cases.prompt: write an automated build script that runs seamlessly on Windows (.bat) and Linux (.sh) without path mismatch issues
assertions: Assistant suggests delegating to Adapter 🔌 agent.
Assistant ensures path separator normalization and cross-OS script compatibility.
Assistant places Adapter 🔌 in Coding Group.

test_cases.prompt: provide a critical code quality audit and anti-pattern review for index.js file
assertions: Assistant suggests Critic 🗣️ agent from Group B.
Assistant strictly enforces that Critic 🗣️ must not write or modify codebase files.
Assistant directs output only to Markdown files or console reports.
